tEn: Show and Tell: A Neural Image Caption Generator
tZh: 展示与讲述：一种神经图像描述生成模型
sEn: A neural image caption generator combining computer vision and machine translation achieves state-of-the-art BLEU scores on multiple datasets.
sZh: 一种结合计算机视觉和机器翻译的神经图像描述生成模型，在多个数据集上取得了最先进的BLEU分数。
absEn: Automatically describing the content of an image is a fundamental problem in artificial intelligence that connects computer vision and natural language processing. In this paper, we present a generative model based on a deep recurrent architecture that combines recent advances in computer vision and machine translation and that can be used to generate natural sentences describing an image. The model is trained to maximize the likelihood of the target description sentence given the training image. Experiments on several datasets show the accuracy of the model and the fluency of the language it learns solely from image descriptions. Our model is often quite accurate, which we verify both qualitatively and quantitatively. For instance, while the current state-of-the-art BLEU-1 score (the higher the better) on the Pascal dataset is 25, our approach yields 59, to be compared to human performance around 69. We also show BLEU-1 score improvements on Flickr30k, from 56 to 66, and on SBU, from 19 to 28. Lastly, on the newly released COCO dataset, we achieve a BLEU-4 of 27.7, which is the current state-of-the-art.
absZh: 自动描述图像内容是人工智能中的一个基本问题，它连接了计算机视觉和自然语言处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度循环架构的生成模型，该模型结合了计算机视觉和机器翻译的最新进展，可用于生成描述图像的自然语句。该模型经过训练，以最大化给定训练图像的目标描述句子的可能性。在多个数据集上的实验显示了模型的准确性以及它仅从图像描述中学习到的语言的流畅性。我们的模型通常非常准确，我们通过定性和定量方式进行了验证。例如，在Pascal数据集上，当前最先进的BLEU-1分数（越高越好）为25，而我们的方法达到了59，相比之下人类表现约为69。我们还在Flickr30k上展示了BLEU-1分数的提升，从56提高到66，在SBU上从19提高到28。最后，在新发布的COCO数据集上，我们实现了27.7的BLEU-4分数，这是当前最先进的水平。

contrib.en: Proposes an end-to-end neural network (NIC) combining CNN and LSTM for image caption generation.
contrib.zh: 提出端到端神经网络（NIC），结合CNN和LSTM生成图像描述。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art BLEU scores on Pascal (59), Flickr30k (66), and SBU (28).
Demonstrates that the model learns fluent language solely from image descriptions.
contrib.zh: 证明模型仅从图像描述中学习流畅语言。

contrib.en: Shows transfer learning capability across datasets with different sizes and noise levels.
contrib.zh: 展示跨不同规模和噪声水平数据集的迁移学习能力。

contrib.en: Provides qualitative and quantitative analysis including human evaluation and diversity of generated captions.
contrib.zh: 提供定性和定量分析，包括人工评估和生成描述的多样性。

limits.en: Model performance is limited by small training dataset sizes, leading to overfitting.
limits.zh: 模型性能受限于小规模训练数据集，导致过拟合。

limits.en: BLEU score may not fully capture caption quality; human evaluation shows lower scores.
limits.zh: BLEU分数可能无法完全反映描述质量；人工评估得分较低。

limits.en: Transfer learning degrades when source and target domains differ significantly.
limits.zh: 当源域和目标域差异显著时，迁移学习效果下降。

limits.en: Model often retrieves training sentences rather than generating novel ones for the top candidate.
limits.zh: 模型在最佳候选描述中常检索训练句子而非生成新句子。

limits.en: Weakly labeled data (e.g., SBU) reduces performance due to noise and vocabulary mismatch.
limits.zh: 弱标注数据（如SBU）因噪声和词汇不匹配降低性能。

items.en: Automatically describing the content of an image is a fundamental problem in artificial intelligence that connects computer vision and natural language processing. In this paper, we present a generative model based on a deep recurrent architecture that combines recent advances in computer vision and machine translation and that can be used to generate natural sentences describing an image. The model is trained to maximize the likelihood of the target description sentence given the training image. Experiments on several datasets show the accuracy of the model and the fluency of the language it learns solely from image descriptions. Our model is often quite accurate, which we verify both qualitatively and quantitatively. For instance, while the current state-of-the-art BLEU-1 score (the higher the better) on the Pascal dataset is 25, our approach yields 59, to be compared to human performance around 69. We also show BLEU-1 score improvements on Flickr30k, from 56 to 66, and on SBU, from 19 to 28. Lastly, on the newly released COCO dataset, we achieve a BLEU-4 of 27.7, which is the current state-of-the-art.
items.zh: 自动描述图像内容是人工智能中的一个基本问题，它连接了计算机视觉和自然语言处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度循环架构的生成模型，该模型结合了计算机视觉和机器翻译的最新进展，可用于生成描述图像的自然句子。该模型经过训练，以最大化给定训练图像的目标描述句子的似然。在多个数据集上的实验显示了模型的准确性以及它仅从图像描述中学习到的语言的流畅性。我们的模型通常非常准确，我们通过定性和定量方式进行了验证。例如，当前Pascal数据集上的最先进BLEU-1分数（越高越好）为25，而我们的方法达到了59，相比之下人类表现约为69。我们还在Flickr30k上展示了BLEU-1分数的提升，从56提高到66，在SBU上从19提高到28。最后，在新发布的COCO数据集上，我们实现了27.7的BLEU-4分数，这是当前最先进的水平。

items.en: Being able to automatically describe the content of an image using properly formed English sentences is a very challenging task, but it could have great impact, for instance by helping visually impaired people better understand the content of images on the web. This task is significantly harder, for example, than the well-studied image classification or object recognition tasks, which have been a main focus in the computer vision community [27]. Indeed, a description must capture not only the objects contained in an image, but it also must express how these objects relate to each other as well as their attributes and the activities they are involved in. Moreover, the above semantic knowledge has to be expressed in a natural language like English, which means that a language model is needed in addition to visual understanding.
items.zh: 能够使用正确构成的英文句子自动描述图像内容是一项非常具有挑战性的任务，但它可能产生巨大影响，例如帮助视障人士更好地理解网页上图像的内容。这项任务比研究充分的图像分类或物体识别任务（这些一直是计算机视觉社区的主要焦点[27]）要困难得多。实际上，描述不仅必须捕捉图像中包含的物体，还必须表达这些物体如何相互关联，以及它们的属性和它们参与的活动。此外，上述语义知识必须用英语等自然语言表达，这意味着除了视觉理解之外，还需要一个语言模型。

items.en: Most previous attempts have proposed to stitch together existing solutions of the above sub-problems, in order to go from an image to its description [6, 16]. In contrast, we would like to present in this work a single joint model that takes an image I𝐼I as input, and is trained to maximize the likelihood p​(S|I)𝑝conditional𝑆𝐼p(S|I) of producing a target sequence of words S={S1,S2,…}𝑆subscript𝑆1subscript𝑆2…S=\{S_{1},S_{2},\ldots\} where each word Stsubscript𝑆𝑡S_{t} comes from a given dictionary, that describes the image adequately.
items.zh: 大多数先前的尝试提出将上述子问题的现有解决方案拼接在一起，以便从图像到其描述[6, 16]。相比之下，我们希望在本文中提出一个单一的联合模型，该模型以图像I作为输入，并经过训练以最大化生成目标词序列S={S1,S2,…}的似然p(S|I)，其中每个词St来自给定的词典，该序列充分描述了图像。

items.capEn: Figure 1: NIC, our model, is based end-to-end on a neural network consisting of a vision CNN followed by a language generating RNN. It generates complete sentences in natural language from an input image, as shown on the example above.
items.capZh: 图1：NIC，我们的模型，基于端到端的神经网络，由视觉CNN和语言生成RNN组成。它从输入图像生成自然语言的完整句子，如上例所示。

items.en: The main inspiration of our work comes from recent advances in machine translation, where the task is to transform a sentence S𝑆S written in a source language, into its translation T𝑇T in the target language, by maximizing p​(T|S)𝑝conditional𝑇𝑆p(T|S). For many years, machine translation was also achieved by a series of separate tasks (translating words individually, aligning words, reordering, etc), but recent work has shown that translation can be done in a much simpler way using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) [3, 2, 30] and still reach state-of-the-art performance. An “encoder” RNN reads the source sentence and transforms it into a rich fixed-length vector representation, which in turn in used as the initial hidden state of a “decoder” RNN that generates the target sentence.
items.zh: 我们工作的主要灵感来自机器翻译的最新进展，其中任务是将源语言中的句子S转换为其在目标语言中的翻译T，通过最大化p(T|S)。多年来，机器翻译也是通过一系列单独的任务（单独翻译单词、对齐单词、重新排序等）实现的，但最近的研究表明，使用循环神经网络（RNN）[3, 2, 30]可以更简单地进行翻译，并且仍然达到最先进的性能。“编码器”RNN读取源句子并将其转换为丰富的固定长度向量表示，该表示又用作“解码器”RNN的初始隐藏状态，生成目标句子。

items.en: Here, we propose to follow this elegant recipe, replacing the encoder RNN by a deep convolution neural network (CNN). Over the last few years it has been convincingly shown that CNNs can produce a rich representation of the input image by embedding it to a fixed-length vector, such that this representation can be used for a variety of vision tasks [28]. Hence, it is natural to use a CNN as an image “encoder”, by first pre-training it for an image classification task and using the last hidden layer as an input to the RNN decoder that generates sentences (see Fig. 1). We call this model the Neural Image Caption, or NIC.
items.zh: 在这里，我们建议遵循这种优雅的方法，将编码器RNN替换为深度卷积神经网络（CNN）。在过去的几年中，已经令人信服地证明，CNN可以通过将输入图像嵌入到固定长度的向量中来生成丰富的输入图像表示，使得这种表示可以用于各种视觉任务[28]。因此，很自然地使用CNN作为图像“编码器”，首先将其预训练用于图像分类任务，并将最后一个隐藏层作为输入提供给生成句子的RNN解码器（见图1）。我们将此模型称为神经图像描述（NIC）。

items.en: Our contributions are as follows. First, we present an end-to-end system for the problem. It is a neural net which is fully trainable using stochastic gradient descent. Second, our model combines state-of-art sub-networks for vision and language models. These can be pre-trained on larger corpora and thus can take advantage of additional data. Finally, it yields significantly better performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches; for instance, on the Pascal dataset, NIC yielded a BLEU score of 59, to be compared to the current state-of-the-art of 25, while human performance reaches 69. On Flickr30k, we improve from 56 to 66, and on SBU, from 19 to 28.
items.zh: 我们的贡献如下。首先，我们提出了一个针对该问题的端到端系统。它是一个可以使用随机梯度下降完全训练的神经网络。其次，我们的模型结合了视觉和语言模型的最先进子网络。这些子网络可以在更大的语料库上进行预训练，从而可以利用额外的数据。最后，与最先进的方法相比，它产生了显著更好的性能；例如，在Pascal数据集上，NIC的BLEU分数为59，而当前最先进水平为25，人类表现达到69。在Flickr30k上，我们从56提高到66，在SBU上从19提高到28。

items.en: The problem of generating natural language descriptions from visual data has long been studied in computer vision, but mainly for video [7, 32]. This has led to complex systems composed of visual primitive recognizers combined with a structured formal language, e.g. And-Or Graphs or logic systems, which are further converted to natural language via rule-based systems. Such systems are heavily hand-designed, relatively brittle and have been demonstrated only on limited domains, e.g. traffic scenes or sports.
items.zh: 从视觉数据生成自然语言描述的问题在计算机视觉中已经研究了很长时间，但主要针对视频[7, 32]。这导致了由视觉原始识别器与结构化形式语言（例如与或图或逻辑系统）组成的复杂系统，这些系统进一步通过基于规则的系统转换为自然语言。这类系统严重依赖手工设计，相对脆弱，并且仅在有限领域（例如交通场景或体育）中得到展示。

items.en: The problem of still image description with natural text has gained interest more recently. Leveraging recent advances in recognition of objects, their attributes and locations, allows us to drive natural language generation systems, though these are limited in their expressivity. Farhadi et al. [6] use detections to infer a triplet of scene elements which is converted to text using templates. Similarly, Li et al. [19] start off with detections and piece together a final description using phrases containing detected objects and relationships. A more complex graph of detections beyond triplets is used by Kulkani et al. [16], but with template-based text generation. More powerful language models based on language parsing have been used as well [23, 1, 17, 18, 5]. The above approaches have been able to describe images “in the wild”, but they are heavily hand-designed and rigid when it comes to text generation.
items.zh: 用自然文本描述静态图像的问题最近引起了更多兴趣。利用物体识别、属性及其位置的最新进展，我们可以驱动自然语言生成系统，尽管这些系统的表达能力有限。Farhadi等人[6]使用检测结果推断场景元素的三元组，并通过模板转换为文本。类似地，Li等人[19]从检测结果开始，使用包含检测到的物体和关系的短语拼凑出最终描述。Kulkani等人[16]使用了比三元组更复杂的检测图，但文本生成基于模板。还使用了基于语言解析的更强大的语言模型[23, 1, 17, 18, 5]。上述方法能够描述“野外”图像，但在文本生成方面严重依赖手工设计且僵化。

items.en: A large body of work has addressed the problem of ranking descriptions for a given image [11, 8, 24]. Such approaches are based on the idea of co-embedding of images and text in the same vector space. For an image query, descriptions are retrieved which lie close to the image in the embedding space. Most closely, neural networks are used to co-embed images and sentences together [29] or even image crops and subsentences [13] but do not attempt to generate novel descriptions. In general, the above approaches cannot describe previously unseen compositions of objects, even though the individual objects might have been observed in the training data. Moreover, they avoid addressing the problem of evaluating how good a generated description is.
items.zh: 大量工作解决了给定图像对描述进行排序的问题[11, 8, 24]。这类方法基于图像和文本在同一向量空间中的共同嵌入思想。对于图像查询，检索在嵌入空间中靠近图像的描述。最接近的是，使用神经网络共同嵌入图像和句子[29]，甚至图像块和子句[13]，但不尝试生成新的描述。通常，上述方法无法描述以前未见过的物体组合，即使单个物体可能在训练数据中出现过。此外，它们避免了评估生成描述质量的问题。

items.en: In this work we combine deep convolutional nets for image classification [12] with recurrent networks for sequence modeling [10], to create a single network that generates descriptions of images. The RNN is trained in the context of this single “end-to-end” network. The model is inspired by recent successes of sequence generation in machine translation [3, 2, 30], with the difference that instead of starting with a sentence, we provide an image processed by a convolutional net. The closest works are by Kiros et al. [15] who use a neural net, but a feedforward one, to predict the next word given the image and previous words. A recent work by Mao et al. [21] uses a recurrent NN for the same prediction task. This is very similar to the present proposal but there are a number of important differences: we use a more powerful RNN model, and provide the visual input to the RNN model directly, which makes it possible for the RNN to keep track of the objects that have been explained by the text. As a result of these seemingly insignificant differences, our system achieves substantially better results on the established benchmarks. Lastly, Kiros et al. [14] propose to construct a joint multimodal embedding space by using a powerful computer vision model and an LSTM that encodes text. In contrast to our approach, they use two separate pathways (one for images, one for text) to define a joint embedding, and, even though they can generate text, their approach is highly tuned for ranking.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们将用于图像分类的深度卷积网络[12]与用于序列建模的循环网络[10]相结合，创建了一个生成图像描述的单一网络。RNN在这个单一的“端到端”网络上下文中进行训练。该模型受到机器翻译中序列生成最近成功的启发[3, 2, 30]，不同之处在于，我们不是从句子开始，而是提供由卷积网络处理的图像。最接近的工作是Kiros等人[15]使用神经网络（但前馈）根据图像和先前单词预测下一个单词。最近Mao等人[21]的工作使用循环神经网络进行相同的预测任务。这与本提案非常相似，但存在一些重要差异：我们使用了更强大的RNN模型，并直接将视觉输入提供给RNN模型，这使得RNN能够跟踪已被文本解释的物体。由于这些看似微不足道的差异，我们的系统在既定基准上取得了显著更好的结果。最后，Kiros等人[14]提出通过使用强大的计算机视觉模型和编码文本的LSTM来构建联合多模态嵌入空间。与我们的方法相比，他们使用两条独立的路径（一条用于图像，一条用于文本）来定义联合嵌入，并且尽管他们可以生成文本，但他们的方法高度针对排序进行了调整。

items.en: In this paper, we propose a neural and probabilistic framework to generate descriptions from images. Recent advances in statistical machine translation have shown that, given a powerful sequence model, it is possible to achieve state-of-the-art results by directly maximizing the probability of the correct translation given an input sentence in an “end-to-end” fashion – both for training and inference. These models make use of a recurrent neural network which encodes the variable length input into a fixed dimensional vector, and uses this representation to “decode” it to the desired output sentence. Thus, it is natural to use the same approach where, given an image (instead of an input sentence in the source language), one applies the same principle of “translating” it into its description.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个神经和概率框架，用于从图像生成描述。统计机器翻译的最新进展表明，给定一个强大的序列模型，可以通过直接最大化给定输入句子的正确翻译的概率，以“端到端”的方式（训练和推理）实现最先进的结果。这些模型使用循环神经网络将可变长度输入编码为固定维度向量，并使用该表示将其“解码”为所需的输出句子。因此，很自然地使用相同的方法，其中给定图像（而不是源语言中的输入句子），应用相同的“翻译”原理将其转换为描述。

items.en: Thus, we propose to directly maximize the probability of the correct description given the image by using the following formulation:
items.zh: 因此，我们建议通过使用以下公式直接最大化给定图像的正确描述的概率：

items.en: where θ𝜃\theta are the parameters of our model, I𝐼I is an image, and S𝑆S its correct transcription. Since S𝑆S represents any sentence, its length is unbounded. Thus, it is common to apply the chain rule to model the joint probability over S0,…,SNsubscript𝑆0…subscript𝑆𝑁S_{0},\ldots,S_{N}, where N𝑁N is the length of this particular example as
items.zh: 其中θ是模型的参数，I是图像，S是其正确的转录。由于S表示任何句子，其长度是无界的。因此，通常应用链式法则对S0,…,SN上的联合概率进行建模，其中N是该特定示例的长度，如下所示：

items.en: where we dropped the dependency on θ𝜃\theta for convenience. At training time, (S,I)𝑆𝐼(S,I) is a training example pair, and we optimize the sum of the log probabilities as described in (2) over the whole training set using stochastic gradient descent (further training details are given in Section 4).
items.zh: 为方便起见，我们省略了对θ的依赖。在训练时，(S,I)是一个训练示例对，我们使用随机梯度下降优化整个训练集上如(2)所述的对数概率之和（进一步的训练细节在第4节中给出）。

items.en: It is natural to model p​(St|I,S0,…,St−1)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝑆𝑡𝐼subscript𝑆0…subscript𝑆𝑡1p(S_{t}|I,S_{0},\ldots,S_{t-1}) with a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), where the variable number of words we condition upon up to t−1𝑡1t-1 is expressed by a fixed length hidden state or memory htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t}. This memory is updated after seeing a new input xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} by using a non-linear function f𝑓f:
items.zh: 很自然地使用循环神经网络（RNN）对p(St|I,S0,…,St-1)进行建模，其中直到t-1的条件词的可变数量由固定长度的隐藏状态或记忆ht表示。该记忆在看到新输入xt后通过非线性函数f更新：

items.en: To make the above RNN more concrete two crucial design choices are to be made: what is the exact form of f𝑓f and how are the images and words fed as inputs xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}. For f𝑓f we use a Long-Short Term Memory (LSTM) net, which has shown state-of-the art performance on sequence tasks such as translation. This model is outlined in the next section.
items.zh: 为了使上述RNN更具体，需要做出两个关键的设计选择：f的确切形式是什么，以及图像和单词如何作为输入xt输入。对于f，我们使用长短期记忆（LSTM）网络，它在翻译等序列任务中展示了最先进的性能。下一节将概述该模型。

items.en: For the representation of images, we use a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). They have been widely used and studied for image tasks, and are currently state-of-the art for object recognition and detection. Our particular choice of CNN uses a novel approach to batch normalization and yields the current best performance on the ILSVRC 2014 classification competition [12]. Furthermore, they have been shown to generalize to other tasks such as scene classification by means of transfer learning [4]. The words are represented with an embedding model.
items.zh: 对于图像的表示，我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）。它们已被广泛用于图像任务的研究，并且目前是物体识别和检测的最先进技术。我们选择的CNN使用了一种新颖的批归一化方法，并在ILSVRC 2014分类竞赛中取得了当前最佳性能[12]。此外，它们已被证明可以通过迁移学习推广到其他任务，如场景分类[4]。单词使用嵌入模型表示。

items.en: The choice of f𝑓f in (3) is governed by its ability to deal with vanishing and exploding gradients [10], the most common challenge in designing and training RNNs. To address this challenge, a particular form of recurrent nets, called LSTM, was introduced [10] and applied with great success to translation [3, 30] and sequence generation [9].
items.zh: 公式(3)中f的选择取决于其处理梯度消失和爆炸的能力[10]，这是设计和训练RNN最常见的挑战。为了解决这一挑战，引入了一种特定形式的循环网络，称为LSTM[10]，并成功应用于翻译[3, 30]和序列生成[9]。

items.capEn: Figure 2: LSTM: the memory block contains a cell c𝑐c which is controlled by three gates. In blue we show the recurrent connections – the output m𝑚m at time t−1𝑡1t-1 is fed back to the memory at time t𝑡t via the three gates; the cell value is fed back via the forget gate; the predicted word at time t−1𝑡1t-1 is fed back in addition to the memory output m𝑚m at time t𝑡t into the Softmax for word prediction.
items.capZh: 图2：LSTM：记忆块包含一个由三个门控制的细胞c。蓝色显示循环连接——时间t-1的输出m通过三个门反馈到时间t的记忆；细胞值通过遗忘门反馈；时间t-1的预测单词除了时间t的记忆输出m之外，还反馈到用于单词预测的Softmax中。

items.en: The core of the LSTM model is a memory cell c𝑐c encoding knowledge at every time step of what inputs have been observed up to this step (see Figure 2) . The behavior of the cell is controlled by “gates” – layers which are applied multiplicatively and thus can either keep a value from the gated layer if the gate is 111 or zero this value if the gate is 00. In particular, three gates are being used which control whether to forget the current cell value (forget gate f𝑓f), if it should read its input (input gate i𝑖i) and whether to output the new cell value (output gate o𝑜o). The definition of the gates and cell update and output are as follows:
items.zh: LSTM模型的核心是一个记忆细胞c，它在每个时间步编码到该步为止观察到的输入知识（见图2）。细胞的行为由“门”控制——这些层通过乘法方式应用，因此如果门为1，则可以保持来自被门控层的值；如果门为0，则将该值归零。特别地，使用了三个门来控制是否遗忘当前细胞值（遗忘门f）、是否读取其输入（输入门i）以及是否输出新的细胞值（输出门o）。门、细胞更新和输出的定义如下：

items.en: where ⊙direct-product\odot represents the product with a gate value, and the various W𝑊W matrices are trained parameters. Such multiplicative gates make it possible to train the LSTM robustly as these gates deal well with exploding and vanishing gradients [10]. The nonlinearities are sigmoid σ​(⋅)𝜎⋅\sigma(\cdot) and hyperbolic tangent h​(⋅)ℎ⋅h(\cdot). The last equation mtsubscript𝑚𝑡m_{t} is what is used to feed to a Softmax, which will produce a probability distribution ptsubscript𝑝𝑡p_{t} over all words.
items.zh: 其中⊙表示与门值的乘积，各种W矩阵是训练参数。这种乘法门使得LSTM能够稳健地训练，因为这些门能很好地处理梯度爆炸和消失问题[10]。非线性函数是sigmoid σ(·)和双曲正切h(·)。最后一个方程m_t用于输入到Softmax，它将产生所有单词上的概率分布p_t。

items.capEn: Figure 3: LSTM model combined with a CNN image embedder (as defined in [12]) and word embeddings. The unrolled connections between the LSTM memories are in blue and they correspond to the recurrent connections in Figure 2. All LSTMs share the same parameters.
items.capZh: 图3：LSTM模型与CNN图像嵌入器（如[12]中定义）和词嵌入相结合。LSTM记忆之间的展开连接以蓝色显示，它们对应于图2中的循环连接。所有LSTM共享相同的参数。

items.en: The LSTM model is trained to predict each word of the sentence after it has seen the image as well as all preceding words as defined by p​(St|I,S0,…,St−1)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝑆𝑡𝐼subscript𝑆0…subscript𝑆𝑡1p(S_{t}|I,S_{0},\ldots,S_{t-1}). For this purpose, it is instructive to think of the LSTM in unrolled form – a copy of the LSTM memory is created for the image and each sentence word such that all LSTMs share the same parameters and the output mt−1subscript𝑚𝑡1m_{t-1} of the LSTM at time t−1𝑡1t-1 is fed to the LSTM at time t𝑡t (see Figure 3). All recurrent connections are transformed to feed-forward connections in the unrolled version. In more detail, if we denote by I𝐼I the input image and by S=(S0,…,SN)𝑆subscript𝑆0…subscript𝑆𝑁S=(S_{0},\ldots,S_{N}) a true sentence describing this image, the unrolling procedure reads:
items.zh: LSTM模型被训练为在看到图像以及所有前面的单词后预测句子的每个单词，定义为p(S_t|I,S_0,…,S_{t-1})。为此，将LSTM以展开形式考虑是有益的——为图像和每个句子单词创建一个LSTM记忆的副本，使得所有LSTM共享相同的参数，并且时间t-1的LSTM的输出m_{t-1}被馈送到时间t的LSTM（见图3）。在展开版本中，所有循环连接都转换为前馈连接。更详细地说，如果我们用I表示输入图像，用S=(S_0,…,S_N)表示描述该图像的真实句子，则展开过程如下：

items.en: where we represent each word as a one-hot vector Stsubscript𝑆𝑡S_{t} of dimension equal to the size of the dictionary. Note that we denote by S0subscript𝑆0S_{0} a special start word and by SNsubscript𝑆𝑁S_{N} a special stop word which designates the start and end of the sentence. In particular by emitting the stop word the LSTM signals that a complete sentence has been generated. Both the image and the words are mapped to the same space, the image by using a vision CNN, the words by using word embedding Wesubscript𝑊𝑒W_{e}. The image I𝐼I is only input once, at t=−1𝑡1t=-1, to inform the LSTM about the image contents. We empirically verified that feeding the image at each time step as an extra input yields inferior results, as the network can explicitly exploit noise in the image and overfits more easily.
items.zh: 其中我们将每个单词表示为一个独热向量S_t，其维度等于字典的大小。注意，我们用S_0表示特殊的开始词，用S_N表示特殊的结束词，它们分别表示句子的开始和结束。特别地，通过发出结束词，LSTM表示已生成完整的句子。图像和单词都被映射到相同的空间，图像通过视觉CNN，单词通过词嵌入W_e。图像I只在t=-1时输入一次，以告知LSTM图像内容。我们通过实验验证，在每个时间步将图像作为额外输入会导致较差的结果，因为网络可以显式地利用图像中的噪声并更容易过拟合。

items.en: Our loss is the sum of the negative log likelihood of the correct word at each step as follows:
items.zh: 我们的损失是每一步正确单词的负对数似然之和，如下所示：

items.en: The above loss is minimized w.r.t. all the parameters of the LSTM, the top layer of the image embedder CNN and word embeddings Wesubscript𝑊𝑒W_{e}.
items.zh: 上述损失相对于LSTM的所有参数、图像嵌入器CNN的顶层和词嵌入W_e进行最小化。

items.en: There are multiple approaches that can be used to generate a sentence given an image, with NIC. The first one is Sampling where we just sample the first word according to p1subscript𝑝1p_{1}, then provide the corresponding embedding as input and sample p2subscript𝑝2p_{2}, continuing like this until we sample the special end-of-sentence token or some maximum length. The second one is BeamSearch: iteratively consider the set of the k𝑘k best sentences up to time t𝑡t as candidates to generate sentences of size t+1𝑡1t+1, and keep only the resulting best k𝑘k of them. This better approximates S=arg⁡maxS′⁡p​(S′|I)𝑆subscriptsuperscript𝑆′𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝑆′𝐼S=\arg\max_{S^{\prime}}p(S^{\prime}|I). We used the BeamSearch approach in the following experiments, with a beam of size 20. Using a beam size of 1 (i.e., greedy search) did degrade our results by 2 BLEU points on average.
items.zh: 有多种方法可用于根据图像生成句子，使用NIC。第一种是采样，我们根据p_1采样第一个单词，然后提供相应的嵌入作为输入并采样p_2，继续这样直到采样到特殊的句子结束标记或达到某个最大长度。第二种是束搜索：迭代地考虑截至时间t的k个最佳句子作为候选，以生成大小为t+1的句子，并只保留其中最终最佳的k个。这更好地近似了S=arg max_{S'} p(S'|I)。在以下实验中，我们使用了束搜索方法，束大小为20。使用束大小为1（即贪婪搜索）会使我们的结果平均降低2个BLEU点。

items.en: We performed an extensive set of experiments to assess the effectiveness of our model using several metrics, data sources, and model architectures, in order to compare to prior art.
items.zh: 我们进行了一系列广泛的实验，使用多种度量、数据源和模型架构来评估我们模型的有效性，以便与现有技术进行比较。

items.en: Although it is sometimes not clear whether a description should be deemed successful or not given an image, prior art has proposed several evaluation metrics. The most reliable (but time consuming) is to ask for raters to give a subjective score on the usefulness of each description given the image. In this paper, we used this to reinforce that some of the automatic metrics indeed correlate with this subjective score, following the guidelines proposed in [11], which asks the graders to evaluate each generated sentence with a scale from 1 to 4111 The raters are asked whether the image is described without any errors, described with minor errors, with a somewhat related description, or with an unrelated description, with a score of 4 being the best and 1 being the worst..
items.zh: 尽管有时不清楚对于给定图像，描述是否应被视为成功，但现有技术提出了几种评估度量。最可靠（但耗时）的方法是要求评分者根据图像对每个描述的有用性给出主观评分。在本文中，我们使用这种方法来加强某些自动度量确实与主观评分相关，遵循[11]中提出的指南，该指南要求评分者以1到4的等级评估每个生成的句子。

items.en: For this metric, we set up an Amazon Mechanical Turk experiment. Each image was rated by 2 workers. The typical level of agreement between workers is 65%percent6565\%. In case of disagreement we simply average the scores and record the average as the score. For variance analysis, we perform bootstrapping (re-sampling the results with replacement and computing means/standard deviation over the resampled results). Like [11] we report the fraction of scores which are larger or equal than a set of predefined thresholds.
items.zh: 对于这个度量，我们设置了一个亚马逊土耳其机器人实验。每张图像由2名工人评分。工人之间的一致性水平通常为65%。在意见不一致的情况下，我们简单地平均分数并将平均值记录为分数。对于方差分析，我们执行自助法（对结果进行有放回重采样，并计算重采样结果的均值/标准差）。与[11]一样，我们报告分数大于或等于一组预定义阈值的比例。

items.en: The rest of the metrics can be computed automatically assuming one has access to groundtruth, i.e. human generated descriptions. The most commonly used metric so far in the image description literature has been the BLEU score [25], which is a form of precision of word n-grams between generated and reference sentences 222In this literature, most previous work report BLEU-1, i.e., they only compute precision at the unigram level, whereas BLEU-n is a geometric average of precision over 1- to n-grams.. Even though this metric has some obvious drawbacks, it has been shown to correlate well with human evaluations. In this work, we corroborate this as well, as we show in Section 4.3. An extensive evaluation protocol, as well as the generated outputs of our system, can be found at \urlhttp://nic.droppages.com/.
items.zh: 其余度量可以在假设有真实标注（即人工生成的描述）的情况下自动计算。迄今为止，图像描述文献中最常用的度量是BLEU分数[25]，它是生成句子和参考句子之间单词n-gram精度的一种形式。尽管该度量有一些明显的缺点，但已证明它与人工评估相关性良好。在本文中，我们也证实了这一点，如第4.3节所示。广泛的评估协议以及我们系统生成的输出可在http://nic.droppages.com/上找到。

items.en: Besides BLEU, one can use the perplexity of the model for a given transcription (which is closely related to our objective function in (1)). The perplexity is the geometric mean of the inverse probability for each predicted word. We used this metric to perform choices regarding model selection and hyperparameter tuning in our held-out set, but we do not report it since BLEU is always preferred 333Even though it would be more desirable, optimizing for BLEU score yields a discrete optimization problem. In general, perplexity and BLEU scores are fairly correlated.. A much more detailed discussion regarding metrics can be found in [31], and research groups working on this topic have been reporting other metrics which are deemed more appropriate for evaluating caption. We report two such metrics - METEOR and Cider - hoping for much more discussion and research to arise regarding the choice of metric.
items.zh: 除了BLEU，还可以使用模型对给定转录的困惑度（这与我们的目标函数（1）密切相关）。困惑度是每个预测单词的逆概率的几何平均值。我们使用这个度量在保留集上进行模型选择和超参数调整，但由于BLEU总是更受青睐，我们不报告它。关于度量的更详细讨论可以在[31]中找到，研究这一主题的研究小组一直在报告其他被认为更适合评估标题的度量。我们报告两个这样的度量——METEOR和Cider——希望关于度量选择的研究和讨论能够更多。

items.en: Lastly, the current literature on image description has also been using the proxy task of ranking a set of available descriptions with respect to a given image (see for instance [14]). Doing so has the advantage that one can use known ranking metrics like recall@k. On the other hand, transforming the description generation task into a ranking task is unsatisfactory: as the complexity of images to describe grows, together with its dictionary, the number of possible sentences grows exponentially with the size of the dictionary, and the likelihood that a predefined sentence will fit a new image will go down unless the number of such sentences also grows exponentially, which is not realistic; not to mention the underlying computational complexity of evaluating efficiently such a large corpus of stored sentences for each image. The same argument has been used in speech recognition, where one has to produce the sentence corresponding to a given acoustic sequence; while early attempts concentrated on classification of isolated phonemes or words, state-of-the-art approaches for this task are now generative and can produce sentences from a large dictionary.
items.zh: 最后，当前关于图像描述的文献也使用了代理任务，即对给定图像的一组可用描述进行排序（例如参见[14]）。这样做的好处是可以使用已知的排序度量，如recall@k。另一方面，将描述生成任务转换为排序任务并不令人满意：随着要描述的图像复杂性的增加以及字典的增大，可能句子的数量随字典大小呈指数增长，而预定义句子适合新图像的可能性将下降，除非这些句子的数量也呈指数增长，这是不现实的；更不用说为每个图像高效评估如此庞大的存储句子库所涉及的计算复杂性。同样的论点也用于语音识别，其中必须生成与给定声学序列对应的句子；虽然早期的尝试集中在孤立音素或单词的分类上，但该任务的最新方法现在是生成式的，可以从大字典中生成句子。

items.en: Now that our models can generate descriptions of reasonable quality, and despite the ambiguities of evaluating an image description (where there could be multiple valid descriptions not in the groundtruth) we believe we should concentrate on evaluation metrics for the generation task rather than for ranking.
items.zh: 既然我们的模型可以生成合理质量的描述，尽管评估图像描述存在歧义（其中可能存在多个不在真实标注中的有效描述），我们认为应该专注于生成任务的评估度量，而不是排序。

items.en: For evaluation we use a number of datasets which consist of images and sentences in English describing these images. The statistics of the datasets are as follows:
items.zh: 为了评估，我们使用多个数据集，这些数据集由图像和描述这些图像的英文句子组成。数据集的统计信息如下：

items.en: With the exception of SBU, each image has been annotated by labelers with 5 sentences that are relatively visual and unbiased. SBU consists of descriptions given by image owners when they uploaded them to Flickr. As such they are not guaranteed to be visual or unbiased and thus this dataset has more noise.
items.zh: 除了SBU，每张图像都由标注者用5个相对视觉化和无偏见的句子进行标注。SBU由图像所有者在将图像上传到Flickr时提供的描述组成。因此，它们不能保证是视觉化的或无偏见的，因此该数据集噪声更大。

items.en: The Pascal dataset is customary used for testing only after a system has been trained on different data such as any of the other four dataset. In the case of SBU, we hold out 1000 images for testing and train on the rest as used by [18]. Similarly, we reserve 4K random images from the MSCOCO validation set as test, called COCO-4k, and use it to report results in the following section.
items.zh: Pascal数据集通常仅用于测试，系统在其他数据（如其他四个数据集中的任何一个）上训练后使用。对于SBU，我们保留1000张图像用于测试，并在其余数据上训练，如[18]所用。类似地，我们从MSCOCO验证集中保留4K随机图像作为测试集，称为COCO-4k，并在下一节中使用它来报告结果。

items.en: Since our model is data driven and trained end-to-end, and given the abundance of datasets, we wanted to answer questions such as “how dataset size affects generalization”, “what kinds of transfer learning it would be able to achieve”, and “how it would deal with weakly labeled examples”. As a result, we performed experiments on five different datasets, explained in Section 4.2, which enabled us to understand our model in depth.
items.zh: 由于我们的模型是数据驱动的并且是端到端训练的，并且考虑到数据集的丰富性，我们想回答诸如“数据集大小如何影响泛化”、“它能实现什么样的迁移学习”以及“它如何处理弱标注样本”等问题。因此，我们在五个不同的数据集上进行了实验，如第4.2节所述，这使我们能够深入理解我们的模型。

items.en: Many of the challenges that we faced when training our models had to do with overfitting. Indeed, purely supervised approaches require large amounts of data, but the datasets that are of high quality have less than 100000 images. The task of assigning a description is strictly harder than object classification and data driven approaches have only recently become dominant thanks to datasets as large as ImageNet (with ten times more data than the datasets we described in this paper, with the exception of SBU). As a result, we believe that, even with the results we obtained which are quite good, the advantage of our method versus most current human-engineered approaches will only increase in the next few years as training set sizes will grow.
items.zh: 我们在训练模型时面临的许多挑战都与过拟合有关。确实，纯监督方法需要大量数据，但高质量的数据集只有不到100000张图像。分配描述的任务严格比对象分类更难，数据驱动方法直到最近才因像ImageNet这样的大数据集（其数据量是本文所述数据集的十倍，除了SBU）而成为主流。因此，我们相信，即使我们获得的结果相当不错，随着训练集规模的增大，我们的方法相对于大多数当前人工设计方法的优势在未来几年只会增加。

items.en: Nonetheless, we explored several techniques to deal with overfitting. The most obvious way to not overfit is to initialize the weights of the CNN component of our system to a pretrained model (e.g., on ImageNet). We did this in all the experiments (similar to [8]), and it did help quite a lot in terms of generalization. Another set of weights that could be sensibly initialized are Wesubscript𝑊𝑒W_{e}, the word embeddings. We tried initializing them from a large news corpus [22], but no significant gains were observed, and we decided to just leave them uninitialized for simplicity. Lastly, we did some model level overfitting-avoiding techniques. We tried dropout [34] and ensembling models, as well as exploring the size (i.e., capacity) of the model by trading off number of hidden units versus depth. Dropout and ensembling gave a few BLEU points improvement, and that is what we report throughout the paper.
items.zh: 尽管如此，我们探索了几种处理过拟合的技术。避免过拟合最明显的方法是将我们系统中CNN组件的权重初始化为预训练模型（例如在ImageNet上）。我们在所有实验中都这样做了（类似于[8]），这在泛化方面帮助很大。另一组可以合理初始化的权重是词嵌入We。我们尝试从大型新闻语料库[22]初始化它们，但没有观察到显著提升，为了简单起见，我们决定不初始化它们。最后，我们进行了一些模型级别的过拟合避免技术。我们尝试了dropout[34]和集成模型，并通过权衡隐藏单元数量和深度来探索模型的大小（即容量）。Dropout和集成带来了几个BLEU点的提升，这就是我们在整篇论文中报告的结果。

items.en: We trained all sets of weights using stochastic gradient descent with fixed learning rate and no momentum. All weights were randomly initialized except for the CNN weights, which we left unchanged because changing them had a negative impact. We used 512 dimensions for the embeddings and the size of the LSTM memory.
items.zh: 我们使用固定学习率且无动量的随机梯度下降训练所有权重集。所有权重都是随机初始化的，除了CNN权重，我们保持不变，因为改变它们会产生负面影响。我们使用512维的嵌入和LSTM记忆大小。

items.en: Descriptions were preprocessed with basic tokenization, keeping all words that appeared at least 5 times in the training set.
items.zh: 描述通过基本分词进行预处理，保留训练集中出现至少5次的所有单词。

items.en: We report our main results on all the relevant datasets in Tables 1 and 2. Since PASCAL does not have a training set, we used the system trained using MSCOCO (arguably the largest and highest quality dataset for this task). The state-of-the-art results for PASCAL and SBU did not use image features based on deep learning, so arguably a big improvement on those scores comes from that change alone. The Flickr datasets have been used recently [11, 21, 14], but mostly evaluated in a retrieval framework. A notable exception is [21], where they did both retrieval and generation, and which yields the best performance on the Flickr datasets up to now.
items.zh: 我们在表1和表2中报告了所有相关数据集上的主要结果。由于PASCAL没有训练集，我们使用了在MSCOCO上训练的系统（可以说是该任务最大且质量最高的数据集）。PASCAL和SBU的最先进结果没有使用基于深度学习的图像特征，因此这些分数的大幅提升可能仅来自这一变化。Flickr数据集最近被使用[11, 21, 14]，但主要在检索框架下评估。一个显著的例外是[21]，他们同时进行了检索和生成，并在Flickr数据集上取得了迄今为止最好的性能。

items.en: Human scores in Table 2 were computed by comparing one of the human captions against the other four. We do this for each of the five raters, and average their BLEU scores. Since this gives a slight advantage to our system, given the BLEU score is computed against five reference sentences and not four, we add back to the human scores the average difference of having five references instead of four.
items.zh: 表2中的人类分数是通过将一个人工描述与其他四个描述进行比较计算得出的。我们对五个评分者中的每一个都这样做，并平均他们的BLEU分数。由于这给我们的系统带来了轻微优势（因为BLEU分数是针对五个参考句子而不是四个计算的），我们将人类分数加回了拥有五个参考而非四个参考的平均差异。

items.en: Given that the field has seen significant advances in the last years, we do think it is more meaningful to report BLEU-4, which is the standard in machine translation moving forward. Additionally, we report metrics shown to correlate better with human evaluations in Table 1444We used the implementation of these metrics kindly provided in \urlhttp://www.mscoco.org.. Despite recent efforts on better evaluation metrics [31], our model fares strongly versus human raters. However, when evaluating our captions using human raters (see Section 4.3.6), our model fares much more poorly, suggesting more work is needed towards better metrics. On the official test set for which labels are only available through the official website, our model had a 27.2 BLEU-4.
items.zh: 鉴于该领域在过去几年取得了显著进展，我们认为报告BLEU-4更有意义，这是机器翻译中未来的标准。此外，我们报告了与人类评估相关性更好的指标，见表1注4。尽管最近在更好的评估指标上做出了努力[31]，我们的模型与人类评分者相比表现强劲。然而，当使用人类评分者评估我们的描述时（见第4.3.6节），我们的模型表现要差得多，这表明需要更多工作来改进指标。在官方测试集上（标签仅通过官方网站提供），我们的模型获得了27.2的BLEU-4。

items.en: Since we have trained many models and we have several testing sets, we wanted to study whether we could transfer a model to a different dataset, and how much the mismatch in domain would be compensated with e.g. higher quality labels or more training data.
items.zh: 由于我们训练了许多模型并有多个测试集，我们想研究是否可以将模型迁移到不同的数据集，以及领域不匹配在多大程度上可以通过更高质量的标签或更多训练数据来补偿。

items.en: The most obvious case for transfer learning and data size is between Flickr30k and Flickr8k. The two datasets are similarly labeled as they were created by the same group. Indeed, when training on Flickr30k (with about 4 times more training data), the results obtained are 4 BLEU points better. It is clear that in this case, we see gains by adding more training data since the whole process is data-driven and overfitting prone. MSCOCO is even bigger (5 times more training data than Flickr30k), but since the collection process was done differently, there are likely more differences in vocabulary and a larger mismatch. Indeed, all the BLEU scores degrade by 10 points. Nonetheless, the descriptions are still reasonable.
items.zh: 迁移学习和数据大小的最明显案例是Flickr30k和Flickr8k之间。这两个数据集的标注方式相似，因为它们是由同一组创建的。实际上，当在Flickr30k上训练时（训练数据大约多4倍），结果提高了4个BLEU点。显然，在这种情况下，通过增加训练数据我们获得了收益，因为整个过程是数据驱动的且容易过拟合。MSCOCO更大（训练数据比Flickr30k多5倍），但由于收集过程不同，词汇差异可能更大，不匹配也更严重。实际上，所有BLEU分数下降了10个点。尽管如此，描述仍然合理。

items.en: Since PASCAL has no official training set and was collected independently of Flickr and MSCOCO, we report transfer learning from MSCOCO (in Table 2). Doing transfer learning from Flickr30k yielded worse results with BLEU-1 at 53 (cf. 59).
items.zh: 由于PASCAL没有官方训练集，并且独立于Flickr和MSCOCO收集，我们报告了从MSCOCO的迁移学习（见表2）。从Flickr30k进行迁移学习的结果更差，BLEU-1为53（对比59）。

items.en: Lastly, even though SBU has weak labeling (i.e., the labels were captions and not human generated descriptions), the task is much harder with a much larger and noisier vocabulary. However, much more data is available for training. When running the MSCOCO model on SBU, our performance degrades from 28 down to 16.
items.zh: 最后，尽管SBU的标签较弱（即标签是标题而非人工生成的描述），但任务更加困难，词汇量更大且噪声更多。然而，有更多的数据可用于训练。当在SBU上运行MSCOCO模型时，我们的性能从28下降到16。

items.en: Having trained a generative model that gives p​(S|I)𝑝conditional𝑆𝐼p(S|I), an obvious question is whether the model generates novel captions, and whether the generated captions are both diverse and high quality. Table 3 shows some samples when returning the N-best list from our beam search decoder instead of the best hypothesis. Notice how the samples are diverse and may show different aspects from the same image. The agreement in BLEU score between the top 15 generated sentences is 58, which is similar to that of humans among them. This indicates the amount of diversity our model generates. In bold are the sentences that are not present in the training set. If we take the best candidate, the sentence is present in the training set 80% of the times. This is not too surprising given that the amount of training data is quite small, so it is relatively easy for the model to pick “exemplar” sentences and use them to generate descriptions. If we instead analyze the top 15 generated sentences, about half of the times we see a completely novel description, but still with a similar BLEU score, indicating that they are of enough quality, yet they provide a healthy diversity.
items.zh: 在训练了一个生成模型p(S|I)后，一个明显的问题是模型是否生成新颖的描述，以及生成的描述是否既多样又高质量。表3展示了一些样本，这些样本来自我们的波束搜索解码器返回的N最佳列表，而不是最佳假设。注意样本是多样的，可能展示同一图像的不同方面。前15个生成句子之间的BLEU分数一致性为58，与人类之间的一致性相似。这表明我们的模型生成的多样性。粗体表示训练集中不存在的句子。如果我们取最佳候选，该句子在训练集中出现的概率为80%。这并不太令人惊讶，因为训练数据量相当小，所以模型相对容易选择“范例”句子并用它们生成描述。如果我们分析前15个生成句子，大约一半的时间我们看到完全新颖的描述，但BLEU分数相似，表明它们具有足够质量，同时提供了健康的多样性。

items.en: While we think ranking is an unsatisfactory way to evaluate description generation from images, many papers report ranking scores, using the set of testing captions as candidates to rank given a test image. The approach that works best on these metrics (MNLM), specifically implemented a ranking-aware loss. Nevertheless, NIC is doing surprisingly well on both ranking tasks (ranking descriptions given images, and ranking images given descriptions), as can be seen in Tables 4 and 5. Note that for the Image Annotation task, we normalized our scores similar to what [21] used.
items.zh: 虽然我们认为排序是评估图像描述生成的不令人满意的方式，但许多论文报告了排序分数，使用测试描述作为候选，根据测试图像进行排序。在这些指标上表现最好的方法（MNLM）专门实现了排序感知损失。尽管如此，NIC在两项排序任务（根据图像排序描述，以及根据描述排序图像）上都表现出奇地好，如表4和表5所示。注意对于图像标注任务，我们像[21]那样对分数进行了归一化。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Flickr-8k: NIC: predictions produced by NIC on the Flickr8k test set (average score: 2.37); Pascal: NIC: (average score: 2.45); COCO-1k: NIC: A subset of 1000 images from the MSCOCO test set with descriptions produced by NIC (average score: 2.72); Flickr-8k: ref: these are results from [11] on Flickr8k rated using the same protocol, as a baseline (average score: 2.08); Flickr-8k: GT: we rated the groundtruth labels from Flickr8k using the same protocol. This provides us with a “calibration” of the scores (average score: 3.89)
items.capZh: 图4：Flickr-8k：NIC：NIC在Flickr8k测试集上的预测（平均分数：2.37）；Pascal：NIC：（平均分数：2.45）；COCO-1k：NIC：来自MSCOCO测试集的1000张图像子集，带有NIC生成的描述（平均分数：2.72）；Flickr-8k：ref：这些是[11]在Flickr8k上使用相同协议评分的结果，作为基线（平均分数：2.08）；Flickr-8k：GT：我们使用相同协议对Flickr8k的真实标签进行评分。这为我们提供了分数的“校准”（平均分数：3.89）

items.capEn: Figure 5: A selection of evaluation results, grouped by human rating.
items.capZh: 图5：按人类评分分组的一组评估结果。

items.en: In order to represent the previous word St−1subscript𝑆𝑡1S_{t-1} as input to the decoding LSTM producing Stsubscript𝑆𝑡S_{t}, we use word embedding vectors [22], which have the advantage of being independent of the size of the dictionary (contrary to a simpler one-hot-encoding approach). Furthermore, these word embeddings can be jointly trained with the rest of the model. It is remarkable to see how the learned representations have captured some semantic from the statistics of the language. Table 6 shows, for a few example words, the nearest other words found in the learned embedding space.
items.zh: 为了将前一个词St-1作为输入表示给生成St的解码LSTM，我们使用词嵌入向量[22]，其优点是与字典大小无关（与更简单的独热编码方法相反）。此外，这些词嵌入可以与模型的其余部分联合训练。值得注意的是，学习到的表示从语言统计中捕获了一些语义。表6展示了一些示例词及其在学习嵌入空间中找到的最近邻词。

items.en: Note how some of the relationships learned by the model will help the vision component. Indeed, having “horse”, “pony”, and “donkey” close to each other will encourage the CNN to extract features that are relevant to horse-looking animals. We hypothesize that, in the extreme case where we see very few examples of a class (e.g., “unicorn”), its proximity to other word embeddings (e.g., “horse”) should provide a lot more information that would be completely lost with more traditional bag-of-words based approaches.
items.zh: 注意模型学习到的一些关系将有助于视觉组件。实际上，将“马”、“小马”和“驴”放在一起将鼓励CNN提取与马类动物相关的特征。我们假设，在极端情况下，当我们看到某个类别的很少示例（例如“独角兽”）时，它与其他词嵌入（例如“马”）的接近性应该提供更多信息，而这些信息在更传统的基于词袋的方法中会完全丢失。

items.en: We have presented NIC, an end-to-end neural network system that can automatically view an image and generate a reasonable description in plain English. NIC is based on a convolution neural network that encodes an image into a compact representation, followed by a recurrent neural network that generates a corresponding sentence. The model is trained to maximize the likelihood of the sentence given the image. Experiments on several datasets show the robustness of NIC in terms of qualitative results (the generated sentences are very reasonable) and quantitative evaluations, using either ranking metrics or BLEU, a metric used in machine translation to evaluate the quality of generated sentences. It is clear from these experiments that, as the size of the available datasets for image description increases, so will the performance of approaches like NIC. Furthermore, it will be interesting to see how one can use unsupervised data, both from images alone and text alone, to improve image description approaches.
items.zh: 我们提出了NIC，一个端到端的神经网络系统，可以自动查看图像并生成合理的英文描述。NIC基于卷积神经网络，将图像编码为紧凑表示，随后由循环神经网络生成相应的句子。该模型训练以最大化给定图像下句子的似然。在多个数据集上的实验显示了NIC在定性结果（生成的句子非常合理）和定量评估方面的鲁棒性，无论是使用排序指标还是BLEU（机器翻译中用于评估生成句子质量的指标）。从这些实验中可以清楚地看出，随着可用于图像描述的数据集规模的增加，像NIC这样的方法的性能也会提高。此外，研究如何利用无监督数据（仅来自图像和仅来自文本）来改进图像描述方法将是有趣的。

items.en: We would like to thank Geoffrey Hinton, Ilya Sutskever, Quoc Le, Vincent Vanhoucke, and Jeff Dean for useful discussions on the ideas behind the paper, and the write up.
items.zh: 我们要感谢Geoffrey Hinton、Ilya Sutskever、Quoc Le、Vincent Vanhoucke和Jeff Dean对论文背后的思想和撰写的有用讨论。
